name: mxfp4_quantize_k4096
description: MXFP4 quantization (sf_vec_size=32, UE8M0 scales). No global scale.

K_packed.description: Packed column dimension (K/2 for FP4, two values per uint8).

num_scale_elems.description: Total number of scale factor elements (layout-dependent).

scales.description: UE8M0 block scale factors (1 byte per 32-element block).
